save_note_description: Save a note or decision to the persistent project memory. Use this to record important decisions, discoveries, or TODOs.
recall_notes_description: Recall notes from project memory by query and optional category. Use this to fetch relevant prior decisions and discoveries on demand.
recall_notes_query_param_description: Text to match against note content and category.
recall_notes_category_param_description: Optional category filter (e.g. architecture, pinned, decision).
list_note_categories_description: List available project note categories with counts.
search_code_description: Search the code index for symbols matching a query string. Returns matching function names, types, variables etc. with their file locations.
search_code_query_param_description: Symbol name or partial name to search for.
index_directory_description: Index a directory with tree-sitter to build or refresh the code memory. Call this when you want to analyse a new project directory.
